The Chief Risk Officer leads the Compliance unit within the Risk & Compliance department.
context: Risk & Compliance (Head: Chief Risk Officer) ... Key Functions: Compliance

description: The Chief Risk Officer leads the Financial Crime unit responsible for regulatory compliance and fraud monitoring.
context: Risk & Compliance (Head: Chief Risk Officer) ... Key Functions: Financial Crime

description: The Chief Risk Officer leads the Internal Audit function to ensure independent oversight of risk controls.
context: Risk & Compliance (Head: Chief Risk Officer) ... Key Functions: Internal Audit

description: The Compliance unit manages Customer Due Diligence processes to verify customer identities and assess baseline risk.
context: Key Functions: Compliance ... Regulatory Responsibilities: Customer Due Diligence (CDD)

description: The Financial Crime unit is directly responsible for end-to-end AML/KYC compliance across the bank.
The Financial Crime unit manages Enhanced Due Diligence procedures specifically for high-risk customer segments.
context: Regulatory Responsibilities: Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) for high-risk customers

description: The Financial Crime unit performs Suspicious Activity Reporting to regulatory bodies upon detecting red flags.
Internal Audit independently reviews Risk Assessment methodologies to ensure accuracy and regulatory alignment.
context: Key Functions: Risk Assessment ... Internal Audit

description: The Chief Risk Officer oversees Fraud Prevention strategies as a core component of the bank's risk mitigation framework.
The Compliance unit enforces the Customer Identification Policy to ensure all onboarding meets KYC standards.
The Financial Crime unit enforces the AML Policy across all customer lifecycle touchpoints.
Internal Audit enforces the Operational Risk Policy by conducting independent control testing and gap analysis.
The Chief Risk Officer owns the Privacy Policy, ensuring data handling aligns with regulatory and customer trust standards.
AML/KYC Compliance activities are strictly governed by the bank's overarching AML Policy framework.
context: Regulatory Responsibilities: AML/KYC compliance ... Key Policies: AML Policy (AML-POL-002)

description: Customer Due Diligence procedures are governed by the Customer Identification Policy to standardize verification steps.
context: Regulatory Responsibilities: Customer Due Diligence (CDD) ... Key Policies: Customer Identification Policy (CID-POL-001)

description: Enhanced Due Diligence protocols are governed by the AML Policy to address elevated risk profiles.
context: Regulatory Responsibilities: Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) ... Key Policies: AML Policy (AML-POL-002)

description: Suspicious Activity Reporting workflows are governed by the AML Policy to ensure timely and accurate regulatory disclosures.
context: Regulatory Responsibilities: Suspicious Activity Reporting (SAR) ... Key Policies: AML Policy (AML-POL-002)
